name: Workplace Cancer as Occupational Illness

mainEntity.name: Does Utah workers' comp cover cancer from workplace exposure in Riverton?
mainEntity.text: Does Utah workers' comp cover cancer from workplace exposure in Riverton?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if medical evidence shows greater than 50% contribution from Riverton work carcinogens.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Firefighters get presumption; others need epidemiology. Insurers apportion; prove dose-response.[5]

description: Yes, if medical evidence shows greater than 50% contribution from Riverton work carcinogens.[5]
